title: lastrea abrupta
intro: Lastrea abrupta, also known as the abrupt lady fern or abrupt fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches, and soothing digestive issues, due to its high content of antioxidants and other bioactive compounds. In traditional herbal preparations, the Lastrea abrupta plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
